name: teigtime-agent-skill
description: Dough recipe calculation skills for Claude — baker's percentages, yeast, and predough math ported from the TeigTime app.

plugins.name: dough-recipe
plugins.description: Computes dough recipes (flour/water/yeast/salt/sugar/fat weights, optional poolish/biga predough, ready-by-time scheduling) from a natural-language request.
